case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ROGER HUMBERTO EK BAEZA

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BAEZA, ROGER HUMBERTO EK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLANTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROGER HUMBERTO ED BAEZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
